articles.title: Potholes: 'Worst is yet to come,' Montreal says as it announces new measures
articles.description: City is buying two new automated pothole-repair machines and is planning to create units dedicated to the issue, but both measures will only come into effect next year.

articles.title: Men are losing a key chromosome with age and it may be deadly
articles.description: Aging men often lose the Y chromosome in a growing number of their cells—and it may be far more dangerous than once believed.
